metaData.Ingredients: Purified Water, Magnesium Sulfate, Potassium Chloride, Salt. *Adds negligible amount of Sodium + Minerals added for taste purified by reverse osmosis non-carbonated*
metaData.Key Information:
Dasani combines filtration with added minerals to deliver premium water with a clean, fresh style that is pure and delicious using the reverse osmosis filtration.Health benefits:
• Boosts skin and beauty health: When dehydrated, your skin can be vulnerable to wrinkling or even skin disorders
• Regulates body temperature: Water helps to cool the body on a hot day or after sports
• Flushes body waste: Water is required in the process of sweating and the passing of urine & faeces
• Maintains digestive health: Dehydration can lead to digestive problems such as constipation

metaData.Key Information:
Using the most advanced filtration process, F&N Ice Mountain Drinking Water brings you ultimately clean drinking water, down to the very last drop. Quench your thirst with the crisp taste of F&N Ice Mountain!The handy sized bottle allows you to hydrate and restore your body's natural balance anywhere you go!Health benefits:
• Boosts skin and beauty health: When dehydrated, your skin can be vulnerable to wrinkling or even skin disorders
• Regulates body temperature: Water helps to cool the body on a hot day or after sports
• Flushes body waste: Water is required in the process of sweating and the passing of urine & faeces
• Maintains digestive health: Dehydration can lead to digestive problems such as constipation
